scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm sidecar:install && pnpm build:sidecar && vite dev
scripts.build: pnpm sidecar:install && pnpm build:sidecar && vite build
scripts.sidecar:install: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const ready = existsSync('src-tauri/sidecar/node_modules/@llamaindex/liteparse/package.json') && existsSync('src-tauri/sidecar/node_modules/.bin/pkg') && existsSync('src-tauri/sidecar/node_modules/.bin/esbuild'); if (ready) process.exit(0); const pnpmBin = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'pnpm.cmd' : 'pnpm'; const result = spawnSync(pnpmBin, ['--dir', 'src-tauri/sidecar', 'install'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
